TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Evaristo Carvalho ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 10, Evaristo Carvalho, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1941) mrhuw Sao tome and principe ta' misuw hya' ga Evaristo Carvalho, aring ryax tay 3 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: e*aris~…ēto ¶~ ®ar*alńßo rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, e*aris~…ēto ¶~ ®ar*alńßo, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw s~…ēao tome an* prin ¶~ ®ipe ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a e*aris~…ēto ¶~ ®ar*alńßo, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Evaristo Carvalho ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 10, Evaristo Carvalho, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1941) mrhuw Sao tome and principe ta' misuw hya' ga Evaristo Carvalho, aring ryax tay 3 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
